channel.title: PHP on Tejiri Mayone
channel.description: Recent content in PHP on Tejiri Mayone

item.title: How to Implement Google Authenticator (TOTP) Two-Factor Authentication in a Stateless Laravel API Using Laravel Passport
item.description: A complete step-by-step guide to implementing optional Google Authenticator (TOTP) two-factor authentication in Laravel Passport APIs using a secure temporary token workflow.

item.title: Implement Username or Email Authentication in Laravel
item.description: A step-by-step guide to implementing username or email authentication in Laravel.

item.title: How to Install Composer Globally in XAMPP (LAMPP) on Ubuntu
item.description: A step-by-step guide to installing Composer globally in XAMPP (LAMPP) on Ubuntu.
